pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-001 (AI Governance) scores 0.397 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Warehouse Architect: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Warehouse Architect.
